title: Rich Jamaican Sweet Potato Gratin
description: A rich and flavorful twist on the classic sweet potato gratin, infused with the warmth of Jamaican spices.
instructions: Pierce the sweet potatoes several times with a fork and bake for 45-50 minutes, or until tender.
While the sweet potatoes are baking, melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to combine. Cook for 1-2 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking constantly to avoid lumps. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until thickened.
Remove the sweet potatoes from the oven and let cool slightly.
Spoon the sweet potato flesh into a baking dish and top with the cheese, jerk seasoning, thyme, and coconut flakes (if using).
Pour the cheese sauce over the top and bake for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
